'''鈭歝h-ch-m''' ('''chachama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codename|codename]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codename|codename]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ch-m
|-
! Lemma
| chachama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chachamithi|chachamithi]] || [[word:chachamiji|chachamiji]] || [[word:chachamishi|chachamishi]] || [[word:chachami|chachami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachamuthuth|chachamuthuth]] || [[word:chachamujuj|chachamujuj]] || [[word:chachamushush|chachamushush]] || [[word:chacham|chacham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachamuthu|chachamuthu]] || [[word:chachamuju|chachamuju]] || [[word:chachamushu|chachamushu]] || [[word:chachamu|chachamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachamufuth|chachamufuth]] || [[word:chachamufuj|chachamufuj]] || [[word:chachamufush|chachamufush]] || [[word:chachamuf|chachamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chachamethe|chachamethe]] || [[word:chachameje|chachameje]] || [[word:chachameshe|chachameshe]] || [[word:chachame|chachame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachamothoth|chachamothoth]] || [[word:chachamojoj|chachamojoj]] || [[word:chachamoshosh|chachamoshosh]] || [[word:chacham|chacham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachamotho|chachamotho]] || [[word:chachamojo|chachamojo]] || [[word:chachamosho|chachamosho]] || [[word:chachamo|chachamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachamofoth|chachamofoth]] || [[word:chachamofoj|chachamofoj]] || [[word:chachamofosh|chachamofosh]] || [[word:chachamof|chachamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chacham忙th忙|chacham忙th忙]] || [[word:chacham忙j忙|chacham忙j忙]] || [[word:chacham忙sh忙|chacham忙sh忙]] || [[word:chacham忙|chacham忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachamathath|chachamathath]] || [[word:chachamajaj|chachamajaj]] || [[word:chachamashash|chachamashash]] || [[word:chacham|chacham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachamatha|chachamatha]] || [[word:chachamaja|chachamaja]] || [[word:chachamasha|chachamasha]] || [[word:chachama|chachama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachamafath|chachamafath]] || [[word:chachamafaj|chachamafaj]] || [[word:chachamafash|chachamafash]] || [[word:chachamaf|chachamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chachamasha|chachamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochachamasha|gochachamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichachamasha|gokichachamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chachamn眉sha|chachamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochachamnkn眉sha|gochachamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichachamn眉sha|gokichachamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chachamsh毛sha|chachamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochachamnksh毛sha|gochachamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichachamsh毛sha|gokichachamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chachamrosha|chachamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachamnkrosha|gochachamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichachamrosha|gokichachamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chachamusha|chachamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachamnkmusha|gochachamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachamusha|gokichachamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chachamsherasha|chachamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochachamnksherasha|gochachamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichachamsherasha|gokichachamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chachamngasha|chachamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochachamnkngasha|gochachamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichachamngasha|gokichachamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chachamyasha|chachamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochachamnkyasha|gochachamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichachamyasha|gokichachamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chachamyamasha|chachamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochachamnkyamasha|gochachamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichachamyamasha|gokichachamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chachamn眉sh毛sha|chachamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochachamnkn眉sh毛sha|gochachamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichachamn眉sh毛sha|gokichachamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chachamn眉rosha|chachamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachamnkn眉rosha|gochachamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichachamn眉rosha|gokichachamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachamn眉musha|chachamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachamnkn眉musha|gochachamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachamn眉musha|gokichachamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chachamsh毛n眉sha|chachamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochachamnksh毛n眉sha|gochachamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichachamsh毛n眉sha|gokichachamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chachamsh毛rosha|chachamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachamnksh毛rosha|gochachamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichachamsh毛rosha|gokichachamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachamsh毛musha|chachamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachamnksh毛musha|gochachamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachamsh毛musha|gokichachamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chachamron眉sha|chachamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochachamnkron眉sha|gochachamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichachamron眉sha|gokichachamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chachamrosh毛sha|chachamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochachamnkrosh毛sha|gochachamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichachamrosh毛sha|gokichachamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachamromusha|chachamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachamnkromusha|gochachamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachamromusha|gokichachamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chachamun眉sha|chachamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochachamnkmun眉sha|gochachamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichachamun眉sha|gokichachamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chachamush毛sha|chachamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochachamnkmush毛sha|gochachamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichachamush毛sha|gokichachamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chachamurosha|chachamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachamnkmurosha|gochachamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichachamurosha|gokichachamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chacham|chacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙ch忙m|ch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochacham|hochacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙ch忙m|hoch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochacham|hohochacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙ch忙m|hohoch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chacham|n眉chacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙ch忙m|n眉ch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chacham|n眉n眉chacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙ch忙m|n眉n眉ch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chacham|n茂chacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙ch忙m|n茂ch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chacham|n茂n茂chacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙ch忙m|n茂n茂ch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchacham|luchacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙ch忙m|luch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchacham|luluchacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙ch忙m|luluch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichacham|lichacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙ch忙m|lich忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichacham|lilichacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙ch忙m|lilich忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochacham|kochacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙ch忙m|koch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochacham|kokochacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙ch忙m|kokoch忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechacham|kechacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙ch忙m|kech忙ch忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechacham|kekechacham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙ch忙m|kekech忙ch忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
